dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses intraday range measurements which map to price_pos_20 (position within 20-period range). Entry at 60% of range approximated as price_pos_20 > 0.6 for longs / < 0.4 for shorts. Exit profit target of 70% range modeled as ~0.7% return (decimal scale). Momentum confirmation uses rsi_14 directional bias. Time stop implemented via hold_hours_max parameter. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries based on market structure.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses intraday range measurements which map to price_pos_20 (position within 20-period range). Entry at 60% of range approximated as price_pos_20 > 0.6 for longs / < 0.4 for shorts. Exit profit target of 70% range modeled as ~0.7% return (decimal scale). Momentum confirmation uses rsi_14 directional bias. Time stop implemented via hold_hours_max parameter. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries based on market structure.

source_rule_text: A trader should enter only in the zone of greatest momentum/highest probability and exit before the move exhausts, rather than attempting to capture the entire move from extreme to extreme.
